params.description: Start date for the analytics period (ISO 8601 format).

params.description: End date for the analytics period (ISO 8601 format).

params.description: Time granularity for the analytics data.

params.description: Metric to sort results by.

params.description: Sort order direction.

params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return.

items.docs: Retrieves analytics data for content items, including views, downloads, shares, and engagement metrics.

info.name: Get Analytics for a Content Item

params.description: Number of top content items to return.
